{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Lington &amp; Bernie Consulting Limited was established on October 8, 1999 to provide efficient and qualitative consulting services to the oil and gas industry as well as banks and financial institutions in the areas of human resources placement and management, human resources consulting services, tax administration and payroll services as well as oil and gas fiscal and contractual terms advisory services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a professional and organized Front Desk Officer to manage the reception, support office administration, coordinate travel, and ensure smooth day-to-day operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome visitors, manage calls, and handle correspondence
	Maintain a tidy, professional front desk and office environment
	Support internal meetings and general office administration
	Coordinate domestic and international travel logistics
	Oversee office facilities and liaise with maintenance vendors.
	Monitor cleaning staff performance and ensure common areas are well-maintained.
	Maintain stock of office supplies and ensure timely restocking.
	Support general office administration and documentation as required


Qualifications


	3 - 4 years of experience in front desk, administrative, or office support roles
	OND holder in Business Administration or relevant field.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Highest level of ethical behavior and discretion
	Flexible and adaptable to changes in a dynamic work environment
	Proactive, with excellent time-management, problem-prevention, and problem-solving skills
	Attention to detail and accuracy in all tasks
	Ability to maintain confidentiality of sensitive information
	PA experience is an added advantage.
	Work effectively, professionally, and tactfully with diverse teams, senior staff, and external partners


Requirements:


	Must be female
	Must be between 21- 25 years of age.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@lingtonandbernie.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-01",

Front Desk Officer Job at Lington & Bernie Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Lington & Bernie Consulting Limited was established on October 8, 1999 to provide efficient and qualitative consulting services to the oil and gas industry as well as banks and financial institutions in the areas of human resources placement and management, human resources consulting services, tax administration and payroll services as well as oil and gas fiscal and contractual terms advisory services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a professional and organized Front Desk Officer to manage the reception, support office administration, coordinate travel, and ensure smooth day-to-day operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome visitors, manage calls, and handle correspondence
	Maintain a tidy, professional front desk and office environment
	Support internal meetings and general office administration
	Coordinate domestic and international travel logistics
	Oversee office facilities and liaise with maintenance vendors.
	Monitor cleaning staff performance and ensure common areas are well-maintained.
	Maintain stock of office supplies and ensure timely restocking.
	Support general office administration and documentation as required


Qualifications


	3 - 4 years of experience in front desk, administrative, or office support roles
	OND holder in Business Administration or relevant field.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Highest level of ethical behavior and discretion
	Flexible and adaptable to changes in a dynamic work environment
	Proactive, with excellent time-management, problem-prevention, and problem-solving skills
	Attention to detail and accuracy in all tasks
	Ability to maintain confidentiality of sensitive information
	PA experience is an added advantage.
	Work effectively, professionally, and tactfully with diverse teams, senior staff, and external partners


Requirements:


	Must be female
	Must be between 21- 25 years of age.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Supermarket Manager",
  "description": "Fort Knox Outsourcing was set up to cater to the growing need of businesses in Nigeria to reap the economic, strategic and operational benefits offered by outsourcing. We act as a &ldquo;Third Party Service Provider&rdquo; that Source, Select, and Second employment ready workforce in line with client specifications to meet their talent needs as quickly as possible!.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supermarket Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Calabar, Cross River
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales growth and ensure achievement of departmental revenue targets.
	Monitor daily, weekly, and monthly sales performance and implement corrective actions when necessary.
	Ensure proper inventory management, stock rotation (FIFO/FEFO), and product availability.
	Maintain strong merchandising standards and ensure compliance with store planograms and display guidelines.
	Analyze product performance including fast-moving and slow-moving items to optimize stock levels.
	Lead, supervise, and develop store team members to ensure operational efficiency and high productivity.
	Implement loss prevention and stock control measures to minimize shrinkage and wastage.
	Ensure excellent customer service and resolve customer complaints promptly.
	Monitor competitor pricing and market trends to maintain competitiveness.
	Prepare periodic reports on sales performance, inventory levels, and operational challenges.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Retail Management, or related discipline.
	Minimum of&nbsp;5 years of experience in supermarket, retail, or FMCG operations.
	Strong knowledge of inventory management, merchandising, and retail operations.
	Proven ability to manage teams and drive sales performance.
	Excellent leadership, analytical, and communication skills.


Salary
N350,000 &ndash; N500,000 / month (depending on experience, qualifications, and role fit).

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should&nbsp;send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@fortknoxoutsourcing.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "FORT KNOX OUTSOURCING"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Cross River",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

Supermarket Manager Job at Fort Knox Outsourcing




        
    

        
        Fort Knox Outsourcing was set up to cater to the growing need of businesses in Nigeria to reap the economic, strategic and operational benefits offered by outsourcing. We act as a “Third Party Service Provider” that Source, Select, and Second employment ready workforce in line with client specifications to meet their talent needs as quickly as possible!.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supermarket Manager
Job Location: Calabar, Cross River
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive sales growth and ensure achievement of departmental revenue targets.
	Monitor daily, weekly, and monthly sales performance and implement corrective actions when necessary.
	Ensure proper inventory management, stock rotation (FIFO/FEFO), and product availability.
	Maintain strong merchandising standards and ensure compliance with store planograms and display guidelines.
	Analyze product performance including fast-moving and slow-moving items to optimize stock levels.
	Lead, supervise, and develop store team members to ensure operational efficiency and high productivity.
	Implement loss prevention and stock control measures to minimize shrinkage and wastage.
	Ensure excellent customer service and resolve customer complaints promptly.
	Monitor competitor pricing and market trends to maintain competitiveness.
	Prepare periodic reports on sales performance, inventory levels, and operational challenges.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Retail Management, or related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in supermarket, retail, or FMCG operations.
	Strong knowledge of inventory management, merchandising, and retail operations.
	Proven ability to manage teams and drive sales performance.
	Excellent leadership, analytical, and communication skills.


Salary
N350,000 – N500,000 / month (depending on experience, qualifications, and role fit).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "MBIS International -&nbsp;We are a well-established Nursery and Primary School committed to maintaining high standards of professionalism, organisation and communication in all aspects of school life. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: &nbsp;Female School&nbsp; Receptionist
Job Location:&nbsp;Jericho, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a Female School Receptionist who is organised, proactive, detail-oriented and capable of supporting a busy school office.
	The successful candidate will serve as the first point of contact for pupils, parents, staff and visitors, while providing essential administrative support to ensure the smooth day-to-day running of the school.
	This role requires someone who is professional, dependable and able to manage responsibilities efficiently in a fast-paced school environment.


Key Responsibilities
Reception and Front Desk:


	Welcome pupils, parents, staff and visitors in a professional and friendly manner.
	Manage the school reception area and ensure visitors follow sign-in procedures.
	Respond to admission enquiries and vendors appropriately.


Administrative Support:


	Provide general office support including photocopying, printing and laminating.
	Maintain clear and accurate handwritten and digital records where required.
	Assist with meeting notes and basic documentation.


Attendance and Records:


	Support daily pupil attendance monitoring and maintain accurate records.
	Record late arrivals and early departures and update school databases where required.


Communication and Organisation:


	Maintain the reception notice boards and ensure information is clear and up to date.
	Support the tracking of school events, birthdays and important dates.
	Assist with creating simple weekly content highlighting school activities for social media.


Parent and Pupil Support:


	Respond professionally to basic parent enquiries regarding school procedures and schedules.
	Provide simple assistance to pupils with minor concerns such as lost items.


Ideal Candidate


	Education:&nbsp;A degree in Administration, Management or a related field.
	Experience:&nbsp;Minimum of 2&ndash;3 years of experience in a receptionist or administrative role, preferably in a school environment.
	Applicants must reside in Ibadan and be able to commute easily to Jericho.


Key Skills and Qualities:


	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong organisation and attention to detail
	Clear and legible handwriting
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and digital systems
	Professional, polite and confident in dealing with parents and visitors
	Ability to multitask and remain calm in a busy environment
	Proactive and able to support senior administrative staff effectively.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, a cover letter (maximum 250 words) explaining why you believe you are suitable for the role, a full-length photograph and one-page handwritten statement explaining why you would like to work in a school environment; the handwritten statement should be clearly written, scanned and attached to your application email to:&nbsp;eyfsrecruitment@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application &ndash; School Receptionist&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	If you believe you have the skills, professionalism and commitment required to excel in this role, we would be delighted to hear from you.

Female School Receptionist Job at MBIS International




        
    

        
        MBIS International - We are a well-established Nursery and Primary School committed to maintaining high standards of professionalism, organisation and communication in all aspects of school life. Our administrative team plays a vital role in ensuring that the school runs efficiently while providing excellent service to pupils, parents, staff and visitors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:  Female School  Receptionist
Job Location: Jericho, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a Female School Receptionist who is organised, proactive, detail-oriented and capable of supporting a busy school office.
	The successful candidate will serve as the first point of contact for pupils, parents, staff and visitors, while providing essential administrative support to ensure the smooth day-to-day running of the school.
	This role requires someone who is professional, dependable and able to manage responsibilities efficiently in a fast-paced school environment.


Key Responsibilities
Reception and Front Desk:


	Welcome pupils, parents, staff and visitors in a professional and friendly manner.
	Manage the school reception area and ensure visitors follow sign-in procedures.
	Respond to admission enquiries and vendors appropriately.


Administrative Support:


	Provide general office support including photocopying, printing and laminating.
	Maintain clear and accurate handwritten and digital records where required.
	Assist with meeting notes and basic documentation.


Attendance and Records:


	Support daily pupil attendance monitoring and maintain accurate records.
	Record late arrivals and early departures and update school databases where required.


Communication and Organisation:


	Maintain the reception notice boards and ensure information is clear and up to date.
	Support the tracking of school events, birthdays and important dates.
	Assist with creating simple weekly content highlighting school activities for social media.


Parent and Pupil Support:


	Respond professionally to basic parent enquiries regarding school procedures and schedules.
	Provide simple assistance to pupils with minor concerns such as lost items.


Ideal Candidate


	Education: A degree in Administration, Management or a related field.
	Experience: Minimum of 2–3 years of experience in a receptionist or administrative role, preferably in a school environment.
	Applicants must reside in Ibadan and be able to commute easily to Jericho.


Key Skills and Qualities:


	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong organisation and attention to detail
	Clear and legible handwriting
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and digital systems
	Professional, polite and confident in dealing with parents and visitors
	Ability to multitask and remain calm in a busy environment
	Proactive and able to support senior administrative staff effectively.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, a cover letter (maximum 250 words) explaining why you believe you are suitable for the role, a full-length photograph and one-page handwritten statement explaining why you would like to work in a school environment; the handwritten statement should be clearly written, scanned and attached to your application email to: [email protected] using "Application – School Receptionist" as the subject of the email.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	If you believe you have the skills, professionalism and commitment required to excel in this role, we would be delighted to hear from you.
